race.comment: ZESHADOW (7) can run well. She was outclassed two back at Caulfield in a much stronger race, battling on well for third last start at Pakenham on tough ground. She looks well suited rising in trip now and draws well. PRO AUSSIE (5) had been knocking on the door and broke through for a narrow win last time at Horsham in BM56 company under 61kg. He should have no issue with the extra rise in trip and should take plenty of running down again. THE MUFFIN MAN (3) hasn't really fired in two runs back but should be an improver rising in trip third up in a fairly thin race. BATOKA CHIEF (12) is going okay and has each way claims.
